Configuration files for cc2564x and nrf52 targets in the NimBLE system.

## Folders
- **[cc2564x](cc2564x/README.md)**: Configuration files for the cc2564x target in the NimBLE system, including BLE transport and host RPA resolver settings.
- **[nrf52](nrf52/README.md)**: Configuration files for the nrf52 target in the NimBLE project, specifying dependencies and settings.
